title: AllergyIntolerance
description: Represents an allergy or intolerance identified for a patient, including the causative substance, reaction details, and clinical status.

reaction.description: Details of the adverse reaction caused by the substance.

manifestation.description: Clinical manifestation or symptom of the reaction.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the allergy/intolerance record. UUID recommended.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient who has this allergy or intolerance.

encounter_id.description: Reference to the encounter during which this allergy or intolerance was identified.

type.description: Whether this represents a true allergy (immune-mediated) or an intolerance (non-immune).

substance.description: Name of the substance that causes the adverse reaction.

clinical_status.description: Current clinical status of the allergy or intolerance.

criticality.description: Estimate of the potential clinical harm or seriousness of future reactions.

onset_date.description: Date when the allergy or intolerance was first identified.

notes.description: Additional notes about the allergy or intolerance.
examples: Confirmed via intradermal skin testing. Avoid all beta-lactam antibiotics.
